[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a close-up, stylized view of two thumbs-up hands against a light blue background, with large outlined text above and below.

Main Subject:
A close-up of a person’s upper torso is shown with a large purple triangular area covering the chest region, and two hands raised giving thumbs-up; one thumb is on the left side of the frame and the other thumb is on the right, both appearing against the background.

Setting:
The background is a flat, light blue gradient with no clear outdoor or indoor context visible.

Visual Details:
The person appears shirtless at the shoulders and upper chest, with the purple triangle overlay centered over the chest area; lighting looks even and somewhat poster-like. The thumbs-up hands are dark-toned in the image, and the composition is tightly cropped around the torso and thumbs, with text occupying the top and bottom areas. The text is bold, white with a black outline, and the top text sits near the upper edge while the bottom text sits near the lower edge.

Visible Text:
Ga Nger ti
Tapi Oke

Practical Summary:
A close-up image shows a shirtless upper torso with a purple overlay on the chest and both hands making thumbs-up gestures. Bold outlined text appears at the top and bottom of the image.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
